title: molinia serotina
intro: Molinia serotina, also known as purple moor-grass, is a perennial plant native to Europe, western Asia, and northwestern Africa. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Molinia serotina include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe digestive issues, and act as an expectorant to help relieve respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Molinia serotina is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties, and it can also be used topically in creams and ointments to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
